title: Zoho Pulse (SalesIQ) Integration with Salesforce
description:
Integrate Zoho SalesIQ (Pulse) live chat with Salesforce CRM to automatically capture chat visitors as leads. The integration migrates Zoho Pulse from the standalone Zoho platform into a Salesforce-connected configuration.

Key requirements:
1. Auto-create lead records in Salesforce when a chat session occurs
2. Configure a Zobot (automated chat bot) to collect required lead fields (name, email, company) before routing to live chat
3. Ensure web-to-lead forms in Gravity Forms include necessary SalesIQ fields to relate Pulse data to Salesforce records

The integration was first tested in a Salesforce Trailhead org (sandbox not supported by SalesIQ) before connecting to the production Salesforce org.
acceptance_criteria: Zoho SalesIQ is integrated with the Salesforce production org
Chat sessions automatically create lead records in Salesforce
Zobot collects name, email, and company before routing to live chat
Lead records contain all required Salesforce fields from chat data
middleware_changes: Zobot configuration to collect required lead fields (name, email, company) before routing to live chat. Automatic lead creation pipeline from SalesIQ to Salesforce.
api_changes: Zoho SalesIQ API integration with Salesforce CRM API for automatic lead record creation from chat sessions.
implementation_notes: SalesIQ does not support Salesforce sandbox connections, so initial testing was done via a Trailhead org. The Zobot must collect company and email to auto-create leads; without these fields, automatic lead creation fails. Lead creation from chat was intermittent initially and required Zobot configuration refinement.
comment_summary: Developer explored SalesIQ documentation and worked with Zoho support to resolve automatic lead creation issues. Zobot configuration was key - it must collect email and company before redirecting to live chat. SalesIQ cannot connect to Salesforce sandbox orgs, requiring a Trailhead org for testing.
